positive: A symmetrical, high-contrast mandala-style celestial design featuring interconnected constellations, glowing nebula swirls, and stylized crescent moons. The composition is centered and vertically balanced, designed as a repeat-friendly patch or print. Utilize deep midnight blues, ethereal lavender, vibrant teal, and stark gold metallic accents for a cosmic, mystical feel. The style should be neo-geometric mixed with detailed engraving work, ensuring clean, crisp lines and strong, graphic silhouettes that read well on fabric. Focus on radiating patterns and harmonious symmetry, suitable for maximum visibility on apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, noisy, messy, gradient (unless intended for nebula), signature, logo, trademark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, cartoonish, photorealistic, messy sketch, jpeg artifacts
